Post: Good morning. How's everyone doing? The strongest rain band from Debby is now east of I-75 and moving northeast. The rain west of I-75 is more sct'd & that's what we should see for the rest of the day as Debby is about to make landfall in the Big Bend & weaken slowly. The focus now moves from Florida to what could be historic flooding for Georgia & the coastal Carolinas from heavy rain as Debby is forecast to slow down.
Hurricane Debby has made landfall around 7am, 5 miles west of Steinhatchee, FL with 80 mph max winds moving NNE at 10mph.
